pages.text: $(bold)Nano Alloy Fragments$() are the refined form of Nano Alloy Blocks. Raw blocks must be smelted in a furnace to break down the outer crust and release the pure nanotech-infused metal inside.$(br2)Fragments are the primary crafting material for all nanotech equipment.
Smelt a Nano Alloy Block to obtain fragments. The process takes longer than normal smelting due to the material's density.

$(bold)Uses:$()$(br)Nano Alloy Fragments are used to craft:$(br)- The Nanosuit helmet, chestplate, leggings, and boots$(br)- The Laser Sword$(br2)Treat them as you would netherite — rare and precious. The asteroid will not fall twice.
